summary: Iteration 33 - Security Hardening & Real Execution Tests. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with all tabs, MM pricing strip, deposit widget with QR code, and crypto off-ramp selectors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security hardening features verified: (1) /api/neno-exchange/security-status returns caps (€50k/tx, €200k/day, 50 NENO/tx) and supported assets (NENO, USDT, USDC, ETH, BTC, BNB). (2) Treasury caps enforcement working - SELL/SWAP/OFFRAMP reject when daily volume exceeds €200k. (3) Rate limiting at 10 ops/min triggers 429. (4) SELL accepts destination_wallet and destination_iban fields. (5) SWAP accepts destination_wallet field. (6) /api/neno-exchange/withdraw-real requires auth and works with proper credentials. (7) Status enforcement: transactions without proof have pending_execution status. (8) WebSocket endpoint exists at /ws/balances/{token}. Frontend shows MM pricing strip with BID, ASK, SPREAD, SKEW, TREASURY, MODEL. All 6 tabs working. Deposit tab has QR code and Force Sync. Off-ramp crypto has USDT/USDC selector.

backend_tests_summary.test_03_security_status_returns_supporte: PASSED - Returns NENO, USDT, USDC, ETH, BTC, BNB
backend_tests_summary.test_05_sell_rejects_when_daily_cap_exce: PASSED - Correctly rejects with cap error
backend_tests_summary.test_06_swap_rejects_when_daily_cap_exce: PASSED - Correctly rejects with cap error
backend_tests_summary.test_07_offramp_rejects_when_daily_cap_e: PASSED - Correctly rejects with cap error
backend_tests_summary.test_08_rate_limit_triggers_429: PASSED - Rate limit triggered on rapid calls
backend_tests_summary.test_13_withdraw_real_with_auth: PASSED - Accepts auth, returns execution proof
backend_tests_summary.test_14_buy_returns_completed_status: PASSED - Returns completed status with treasury proof
backend_tests_summary.test_15_sell_status_depends_on_proof: PASSED - Status based on execution proof

frontend_tests_summary.mm_pricing_strip: VERIFIED - Shows BID 10,009.98, ASK 10,189.98, SPREAD 180.0 bps, SKEW +3.15%, TREASURY 697.0, MODEL Market Maker
frontend_tests_summary.tabs: VERIFIED - All 6 tabs present: buy, sell, swap, deposit, offramp, create
frontend_tests_summary.sell_tab: VERIFIED - Asset select, amount input, sell button found
frontend_tests_summary.swap_tab: VERIFIED - From/to selects, amount input, swap button found
frontend_tests_summary.offramp_tab: VERIFIED - Card/Bank/Crypto destinations, wallet input, USDT/USDC selectors found
frontend_tests_summary.deposit_tab: VERIFIED - Deposit widget, QR code, wallet address (0x18CE...), force sync button found
frontend_tests_summary.contract_info: VERIFIED - Contract info footer and platform wallet address displayed

features_verified.security_status_endpoint: ✓ Returns caps (€50k/tx, €200k/day, 50 NENO/tx), rate limit (10 ops/min), supported assets
features_verified.treasury_caps_enforcement: ✓ SELL/SWAP/OFFRAMP reject when daily volume exceeds €200k
features_verified.rate_limiting: ✓ 10+ rapid calls result in 429 HTTP errors
features_verified.withdraw_real_endpoint: ✓ Works with correct auth, returns execution proof
features_verified.status_enforcement: ✓ Transactions without proof have pending_execution status
features_verified.frontend_exchange_page: ✓ Renders properly with login and navigation
